identity.title:
Full-Stack Developer
& Cybersecurity Educator & Information Security Researcher
identity.bio: A self-taught engineer focused on the intersection of **Web Development**, **Cybersecurity** and **Fundamental Programming**. built 2 web apps and systems including the bitcyberbox web app and mailing system to handle up to 1K Users.

skills.items: Python, JavaScript, PHP, HTML/CSS, Shell Scripting
KVM, QEMU, Libvirt, Linux Server Management, Web Application management, repository management.

experience.title: Lead Administrator @ bitcyberbox.com
experience.description: Architected and deployed an online IT training platform. Managed server infrastructure, security protocols, and custom UI components.

experience.title: Virtualization Enthusiast
experience.description: Developed custom Python-based tools for managing hardware and KVM environments.
